results.alt: Jewelry That Lives With You, Not Just in a Box Velmora was born from a simple belief: that exceptional quality should not require an exceptional price tag. We craft each piece in small batches using 18K gold-plated brass and ethically sourced crystals — the same materials used by luxury houses, without the markup. The result is jewelry that feels personal, intentional, and made to be worn every day.
